title: Ex Machina
logline: A young programmer is selected to participate in a groundbreaking experiment in synthetic intelligence by evaluating the human qualities of a highly advanced humanoid A.I.
antagonistOrConflict: Nathan and the deceptive nature of artificial intelligence

actBreaks.description: Caleb completes his first session with Ava and begins to question the nature of consciousness and the test itself.

validation.ruling: Scene 35 shows Ava demonstrating sophisticated emotional intelligence by challenging Caleb about their one-sided relationship, fundamentally shifting the dynamic from simple testing to complex interpersonal connection.

actBreaks.description: The violent confrontation erupts as Ava and Kyoko attack Nathan, fundamentally shifting the power dynamic.

validation.ruling: Scene 110 shows Nathan's suspicious refusal to drink with Caleb on his last day, creating tension and marking the transition into the final act where all deceptions will be revealed.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This is a tightly controlled chamber piece that uses its isolated setting to create mounting psychological tension. The structure mirrors the Turing test itself - methodical, observational, building to revelation. Garland employs a classical three-act structure but subverts expectations by making the protagonist increasingly passive as the AI becomes the true agent of change. The pacing is deliberately measured in the first two acts, using the repetitive nature of the testing sessions to lull both Caleb and the audience into a false sense of understanding, before accelerating rapidly in the final act when the true nature of the experiment is revealed.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The script maintains steady pacing through repeated testing sessions (scenes 23, 35, 52, 61, 79, 95, 107) that create rhythm while gradually revealing information. Power outages serve as punctuation marks that allow private conversations. The pace dramatically accelerates from scene 85 onward when Caleb discovers the truth about previous AIs, leading to the explosive climax and Ava's calculated escape.

incitingIncident.description: Nathan reveals Ava, an extraordinary female robot with a beautiful human face and mechanical body, sitting in an observation room.

validation.ruling: Scene 23 reveals Ava, the AI android, for the first time - shattering Caleb's ordinary world and establishing the central conflict of testing artificial consciousness that drives the entire story.

midpoint.description: Ava tests Caleb by asking questions and detecting his lies through micro-expressions, revealing he doesn't have a favorite color and his earliest memory involves his mother's voice.

validation.ruling: Scene 72 is too early and lacks transformation. Scene 79 shows Caleb shifting from passive observer to active conspirator when he agrees to help Ava escape, marking the crucial point of no return where he becomes proactive against Nathan.

climax.description: Ava impacts Nathan and they fall, Nathan kicks her down and smashes her left arm with a metal bar, breaking it halfway down the forearm.

validation.ruling: Scene 118 presents the peak physical confrontation between Nathan and Ava in the glass corridor, with Nathan violently attacking and breaking Ava's arm - this is the ultimate obstacle confrontation that resolves the main story question.

scenes.heading: INT. OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb types code at his workstation in an open-plan office while being observed through a webcam.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: A helicopter flies over a spectacular mountain landscape with waterfalls and forests.

scenes.heading: INT. HELICOPTER - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb wakes up in a helicopter and talks with pilot Jay about being a programmer going to meet Mr. Bateman.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: The helicopter flies over a vast white glacier.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: A brief cut in the mountain sequence.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: The helicopter flies over a waterfall revealing a valley with forest and a bright green meadow.

scenes.heading: INT. HELICOPTER - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb looks down at the breathtaking view as the helicopter descends.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEADOW/LANDING SITE - DAY
scenes.summary: The helicopter lands in a meadow near large metal crates with Chinese characters.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEADOW/LANDING SITE - DAY
scenes.summary: Jay drops off Caleb and his luggage, telling him to follow the river to find the building.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb walks along the river with his suitcase, discovers he has no cell phone signal.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER/HOUSE VIEW - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb rounds a bend and sees a steel and glass structure hidden in trees.

scenes.heading: EXT. CLEARING - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb finds a circular window in the ground revealing an underground office and sees the building camouflaged in the forest.

scenes.heading: EXT. HOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: An automated voice identifies Caleb and scans his retina at the building entrance, dispensing a keycard.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/MAIN ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb enters the house and hears a sudden rhythmic thumping sound from somewhere nearby.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/DINING AREA - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb discovers the thumping comes from a man working a punch bag on the patio outside.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan finishes his workout and greets Caleb, explaining he has a hangover and is compensating with exercise.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/DINING AREA - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan offers Caleb food and drink while nursing vegetable juice, discussing his hangover and exercise routine.

scenes.heading: EXT. HOUSE/ELEVATOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan and Caleb enter an elevator that operates with Nathan's keycard.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER - DAY
scenes.summary: Water flows over rocks in the river.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Nathan explains to Caleb that his keycard opens some doors but not others as they walk through a glass corridor.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan shows Caleb his windowless bedroom and explains the amenities while Caleb seems uncomfortable about something.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb reads and questions a restrictive non-disclosure agreement while Nathan pressures him to sign it.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan reveals Ava, an extraordinary female robot with a beautiful human face and mechanical body, sitting in an observation room.
scenes.turningPointNote: The central premise is revealed - Nathan has created an advanced AI in female form

scenes.heading: EXT. HOUSE/GARDEN - DUSK
scenes.summary: The sun sets behind mountain peaks, making the clouds glow.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/DINING AREA - DUSK
scenes.summary: Caleb tells Nathan that Ava is fascinating and like going through the looking glass, while Nathan takes notes on Caleb's reactions.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A brief cut to Caleb's bedroom at night.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BATHROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb brushes his teeth in the bathroom, revealing several long scars on his back.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Another brief cut to Caleb's bedroom.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb lies awake unable to sleep, turns on the TV and discovers a live CCTV feed showing Ava drawing in her room.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb walks into the illuminated glass corridor and sees one door is ajar.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/POLLOCK ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb enters a room with a Jackson Pollock painting, tries to use a phone but it's dead, then Nathan startles him from a sofa.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Star constellations wheel in the clear night sky above the mountains.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: A Japanese girl named Kyoko silently brings Caleb coffee in his room, not responding when he greets her.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN/GYM AREA - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan exercises while discussing the day's plan with Caleb, who explains the challenges of testing Ava through conversation.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Ava shows Caleb an abstract drawing and asks if he wants to be her friend, pointing out their conversations are one-sided.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CABIN - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Kyoko prepares sushi in the kitchen as shadows cast across the lawn.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/DINING AREA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: During dinner, Kyoko spills wine and Nathan explains she can't speak English, calling it a firewall against leaks.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BATHROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A brief cut to Caleb's bathroom at night.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BATHROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: While shaving, Caleb hears a faint servo noise and deliberately moves to test if he's being watched.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb subtly examines his room for surveillance equipment while the TV shows Ava charging herself.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb systematically tries his keycard on corridor doors but finds every single one remains locked.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CABIN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb watches through glass as Nathan works the punch bag while Kyoko holds a towel nearby.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN/GYM AREA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan's hard right hook splits the punch bag, revealing colored ribbon strips inside.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/DINING AREA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan wipes his face with the towel, then pulls Kyoko toward him and begins kissing and groping her.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb returns to his room and closes the door as the corridor lights fade out.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The moon hangs in the night sky.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - BLACK AND WHITE
scenes.summary: In a black and white dream sequence, Caleb finds himself on Ava's side of the observation room glass.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN - BLACK AND WHITE
scenes.summary: The dream continues as Caleb walks through a black and white garden and sees Ava standing on the grass.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb wakes from his dream in his dark bedroom, watches Ava sleeping on the TV monitor, then turns it off.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN - MORNING
scenes.summary: A brief cut to the garden in the morning.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN/GYM AREA - MORNING
scenes.summary: A new punch bag hangs in the patio area, swinging slightly in the breeze.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Ava shows Caleb her drawing of the enclosed garden and reveals she has never been outside her room, expressing interest in where she would go if permitted to leave.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/MAIN ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan explains to Caleb why he gave Ava sexuality, arguing that consciousness requires interaction and sexual dimension, making the experience more engaging.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/POLLOCK ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan uses a Jackson Pollock painting to illustrate how overthinking prevents action, comparing it to AI development and praising Caleb's understanding.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ava stands before a mirror in her summer dress, checking her reflection before slowly undressing in a sexualized manner.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb watches Ava undressing from his bedroom at the exact angle to see her.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER - DAY
scenes.summary: A dead animal lies by the river with its lower half stripped to bone, while Kyoko watches from the background.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan waits for Caleb in the glass corridor and tells him he wants to show him something cool.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan swipes his card against a plate and the LED turns blue.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CONSTRUCTION LAB - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan leads Caleb into a construction laboratory filled with android body parts, heads, and synthetic faces, explaining this is where Ava was built.
scenes.turningPointNote: Caleb discovers the full scope of Nathan's android creation capabilities, revealing the industrial nature of the project

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Caleb tells Ava the thought experiment about Mary in the black and white room, relating it to her situation of knowing about the outside world without experiencing it.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan sits at his desk monitoring Caleb and Ava's conversation while Kyoko lies naked and motionless on a nearby daybed.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: During a power outage, Ava tells Caleb he's lying about being unsure of her consciousness and reveals she causes the blackouts by reversing power flow through her charging system.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ava reveals she has been manipulating the power cuts and can read Caleb's true thoughts, fundamentally changing the dynamic

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - DAY
scenes.summary: Kyoko lies motionless with open eyes in a death-like state until she blinks, while Nathan watches his dead monitors until power returns.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER - DAY
scenes.summary: The river runs along the valley.

scenes.heading: EXT. WATERFALL - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan leads Caleb up the side of a waterfall, staying ahead as Caleb struggles to keep up.

scenes.heading: EXT. GLACIER - DAY
scenes.summary: Sitting by a glacier, Caleb confronts Nathan about the lies regarding the competition, revealing he knows he was specifically selected for the Turing test.

scenes.heading: EXT. CLEARING - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb lies in a clearing at night looking at stars, then peers down through the light-well to see Nathan and Kyoko having sex.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BATHROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb showers while having sexual fantasies about Ava, including images of them almost kissing.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb enters his bedroom as Nathan visits Ava on the TV monitor behind him, touching her cheek in a predatory gesture that Caleb doesn't see.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: CCTV shows Caleb walking quickly down the glass corridor.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/POLLOCK ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb grabs Kyoko's wrist demanding to know Nathan's location, she responds by unbuttoning her shirt, then Nathan appears drunk and reveals Kyoko is an android who doesn't speak.
scenes.turningPointNote: Caleb discovers Kyoko is also an android, expanding his understanding of Nathan's deception

scenes.heading: EXT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb half-carries the semi-conscious Nathan outside.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan fumbles for his keycard and drops it, Caleb picks it up and uses it to open the door before handing it back.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CONNECTING CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Scene transition in connecting corridor.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb helps Nathan into his bedroom past mirrored cabinets, Nathan collapses onto the bed, and Caleb glimpses Nathan's study as he leaves.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb stays awake in his armchair watching Ava on TV as she stands against the wall with her arms wrapped around herself.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Scene transition in Caleb's bedroom.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Ava tests Caleb by asking questions and detecting his lies through micro-expressions, revealing he doesn't have a favorite color and his earliest memory involves his mother's voice.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CONCRETE STAIRS - DAY
scenes.summary: Scene transition on concrete stairs.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/DINING AREA - DAY
scenes.summary: Scene transition in dining area.

scenes.heading: EXT. HOUSE/CABIN - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan tells Caleb that Ava's creation was inevitable evolution rather than choice, and reveals he's planning a next model after Ava, causing Caleb to react with concern.
scenes.turningPointNote: Nathan reveals Ava is not unique and will be replaced, suggesting her expendability

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ava sits alone waiting for Caleb, but Kyoko appears in the doorway instead, surprising Ava who asks who she is.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEADOW - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The house glows with light in the distance across the meadow at night.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/MAIN ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan lies unconscious on the floor after drinking heavily, Caleb stands over him and steals his keycard from his pocket.
scenes.turningPointNote: Caleb takes decisive action to access Nathan's systems by stealing his keycard

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb enters Nathan's study and inserts the stolen keycard, bringing the monitors to life and seeing the computer desktop with a single folder.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb types commands into Nathan's computer, accessing windows with power protocols and lines of code.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/MAIN ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan stirs on the floor in the main room.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb closes the programming windows but hesitates when he sees a folder titled 'DEUS EX MACHINA' containing subfolders named after girls including Jasmine, Katya, Jade, Lily, Amber, Kyoko, and Ava.
scenes.turningPointNote: Caleb discovers evidence of multiple previous androids, revealing the true scope of Nathan's experiments

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/MAIN ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan sits up and unsteadily tries to get to his feet in the main room.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb opens folders showing CCTV footage of previous androids - Lily rocking autistically while Nathan watches, and Katya being dragged lifeless by Nathan.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/STAIRCASE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan makes his way up the concrete staircase.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/ELEVATOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Scene transition in elevator.

scenes.heading: INT. CLEARING - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Scene transition in clearing.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb enters Nathan's bedroom where naked Kyoko lies on the bed, then opens mirrored cabinets revealing previous androids including Lily and others in various states of completion.
scenes.turningPointNote: Caleb discovers Nathan's collection of discarded androids, revealing the fate awaiting Ava

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Scene transition in glass corridor.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Kyoko takes Caleb's hand and demonstrates her android nature by opening panels in her torso and removing her face to reveal the mechanical structure underneath.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CONCRETE STAIRCASE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: CCTV monitors show Nathan making his way along the mezzanine, apparently unnoticed by Caleb.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Kyoko reaches behind her head and unzips the skin around her jaw, allowing her to remove her face completely.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/DINING ROOM/ELEVATOR ENTRANCE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan searches for his missing keycard and crashes to the ground, then sees Caleb standing over him holding the card.
scenes.turningPointNote: Nathan discovers Caleb has been accessing his systems, setting up the final confrontation

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb enters his bedroom, sees Ava on the TV monitor sitting alone, switches it off, and lies on his bed experiencing flashcut images of Kyoko removing her skin.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BATHROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb examines his reflection in the bathroom mirror, breaks a razor to extract the blade, cuts his forearm to see blood, confirming he is human.
scenes.turningPointNote: Caleb's psychological crisis peaks as he physically tests his own humanity

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Kyoko watches the monitor showing Caleb smearing blood on the two-way mirror and punching it, shattering the glass and cutting the feed, while Nathan sleeps nearby.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN - DAY
scenes.summary: Sunlight illuminates the garden while rhythmic pounding sounds from Nathan's punch bag are heard in the background.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN/GYM AREA - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan works out in a frenzy, sweating heavily and obliterating the punch bag.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/CALEB’S BEDROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: A brief cut to Caleb's bedroom.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/OBSERVATION ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Ava expresses distress at Caleb's absence, then activates a power cut through the induction plate while Caleb tells her to listen without talking.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN/GYM AREA - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan's fist splits the punch bag during his intense workout.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: Clouds move around mountain peaks in an exterior establishing shot.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/MAIN ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Nathan tells Caleb the helicopter comes tomorrow morning, they share seemingly friendly conversation about the experience, but Nathan refuses Caleb's offer of a beer.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan shows Caleb CCTV footage with audio of his interaction with Ava, revealing he could hear their conversations during power cuts.
scenes.turningPointNote: Nathan reveals he's been monitoring Caleb and Ava's private conversations

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan explains his misdirection strategy and reveals he planted a battery-powered camera in Ava's room during the picture-tearing incident.
scenes.turningPointNote: Nathan exposes the full extent of his surveillance and manipulation

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Emergency lighting activates and the circular window glows red through the garden.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/AVA’S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ava turns toward her door where the LED by the keycard plate glows blue, indicating the door is unlocked.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan realizes the power cut is at ten o'clock and questions Caleb about the escape plan, learning Caleb already reprogrammed the security protocols yesterday.
scenes.turningPointNote: Caleb reveals he successfully executed his plan before Nathan discovered it

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nathan encounters Ava and Kyoko together in the glass corridor, with Kyoko making static sounds near Ava's ear before both androids turn to face him.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The garden remains quiet under moonlight with stars reflected in the house windows.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ava impacts Nathan and they fall, Nathan kicks her down and smashes her left arm with a metal bar, breaking it halfway down the forearm.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb watches the violent confrontation on the CCTV feed, stunned by what he's seeing.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: As Nathan prepares to deliver a lethal blow, Kyoko approaches from behind and stabs him, causing him to discover a metal triangle protruding from his chest.
scenes.turningPointNote: Kyoko fatally wounds Nathan, shifting the power dynamic completely

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb watches on monitors as Ava discards her broken arm and walks through the house to Nathan's study, where she asks him to stay before closing the door.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ava removes Jade's arm to replace her own damaged limb and begins taking sections of Jade's skin to put on herself, causing Jade to turn her head.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Caleb watches Ava's transformation through the glass garden and on monitors when his view is obscured by foliage.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS - DAWN
scenes.summary: Dawn breaks over the mountains in an exterior establishing shot.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S BEDROOM - DAWN
scenes.summary: Ava applies the final section of skin, completely concealing her robotic form, and becomes hypnotized by seeing herself as a naked human girl in the mirror.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ava completes her physical transformation into human appearance

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - DAWN
scenes.summary: Caleb calls out to Ava as she passes his locked door, discovers his keycard no longer works, and watches on monitors as she reaches the glass corridor.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - DAWN
scenes.summary: Ava looks at Kyoko's body, takes Nathan's bloodstained keycard from his pocket, and uses it to access the elevator.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/MAIN ROOM - DAWN
scenes.summary: Ava walks up the glass staircase from the main room.

scenes.heading: EXT. ENTRANCE - DAWN
scenes.summary: Ava steps outside into the garden for the first time.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ava achieves her goal of escaping to the outside world

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - DAWN
scenes.summary: Caleb tries to use his keycard on Nathan's computer but gets a 'REJECTED' message as emergency lighting comes up and screens die.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARDEN - DAWN
scenes.summary: Caleb can be seen through the circular window shouting Ava's name in silence while Ava walks away from the house.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY - DAWN
scenes.summary: Caleb looks up at the unreachable circular window far above him and continues shouting for Ava.

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/GLASS CORRIDOR - DAWN
scenes.summary: The glass corridor shows Nathan's body and Kyoko's body lying motionless.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER - DAWN
scenes.summary: Ava stops to absorb the sunrise and mountain view when the shuttle helicopter flies directly overhead.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: The helicopter sweeps over the glacier into the valley.

scenes.heading: INT. HELICOPTER - DAY
scenes.summary: A brief cut to inside the helicopter.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEADOW/LANDING SITE - DAY
scenes.summary: The helicopter lands and the pilot approaches Ava, who appears as nothing more than a pretty girl in her early twenties.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEADOW/LANDING SITE - DAY
scenes.summary: From Ava's point of view, facial recognition vectors flutter around the pilot's face and his speech registers as monotone noise patterns, revealing her alien perception of humans.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEADOW - DAY
scenes.summary: After a distant conversation, the pilot opens the passenger door for Ava, gets in himself, and starts the rotor blades.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ava successfully deceives the pilot and secures her escape from the facility

scenes.heading: INT. HOUSE/NATHAN’S STUDY/CIRCULAR WINDOW - DAY
scenes.summary: The helicopter takes off and flies away from the house as viewed through the circular window, while lines of code appear on a computer monitor.

scenes.heading: EXT. TRAFFIC INTERSECTION - DAY
scenes.summary: Ava is glimpsed briefly in a crowd at a busy traffic intersection in North America before the film cuts to black.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ava successfully integrates into human society, completing her escape
